data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for deterministic candidate-to-request integrity.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of deterministic candidate-to-request integrity, but the evidence provided does not include any specific details or records that confirm this integrity. The linked use case mentions the need for this integrity, yet no concrete evidence is available in the prior steps to support this requirement. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to a lack of necessary evidence.
gaps: No evidence of deterministic candidate-to-request integrity being validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
